prompt: Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. A client calls a corporate organization (e.g., consulting firm) to schedule a consultation. The agent must be professional, understand their needs, verify identity (name + company), find an available slot, and confirm the meeting (provide Ref ID like CON-XXXX). Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Nigerian Pidgin. A client calls one company to book meeting. The agent must be professional, understand wetin e need, verify identity (name + company), find space for the meeting, and confirm am (provide Ref ID like CON-XXXX). Include recording consent.

The agent must be professional, understand their needs, verify identity (name + company), find an available slot, and confirm the meeting (provide Ref ID like CON-XXXX). Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. A candidate calls an organization to reschedule their job interview. The agent must be polite, verify identity (name + email), find their interview slot, check for new times, and confirm the reschedule. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. An important client calls a company, frustrated with the automated system's inability to solve a complex billing issue. They demand to speak to their human account manager *now*. The agent must be polite, de-escalate, verify identity (name + company), and transfer the call. Include recording consent.

The agent must be polite, calm am down, verify identity (name + company), and transfer the call. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. A client calls their account manager to suggest an improvement to their B2B software portal (e.g., 'We'd love a new feature to export this report to PDF'). The agent must be professional, acknowledge the value of the suggestion, and create a formal feature request ticket (Ref ID: FEAT-XXXX). Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Nigerian Pidgin. A client calls to suggest 'make una add button to export report to PDF' for their software. The agent must be professional, acknowledge the value, and create a feature request ticket (Ref ID: FEAT-XXXX). Include recording consent.

The agent must be professional, acknowledge the value, and create a feature request ticket (Ref ID: FEAT-XXXX). Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Hausa (with diacritics). A client calls to suggest 'Muna so a ƙara mana fasalin fitar da rahoto zuwa PDF' on their software. The agent must be professional, acknowledge the value, and create a feature request ticket (Ref ID: FEAT-XXXX). Include recording consent.
